bluetooth_confirm.title: Protimeter BLE — {name}
bluetooth_confirm.description: Set up the Protimeter sensor at {address}.

manual.title: Add Protimeter BLE sensor manually
manual.description: Enter the Bluetooth MAC address of your Protimeter sensor (e.g. 00:22:A3:00:C7:57).

abort.already_in_progress: Configuration is already in progress for this device.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the device. Make sure it is nearby and not connected to another app.
